title: Bárbara Sánchez-Kane is descending to hell through the mouth of a volcano
description: At her artist residency in Shanghai, the Mexican designer’s latest work attempts to make sense of the world ‘through our inner volcanoes’
content: Bárbara Sánchez-Kanes approach to creativity has always been holistic. Though she trained as a designer at Florences prestigious Polimoda school, her work has always skated between the boundaries of … [+7218 chars]
de: Bárbara Sánchez-Kane steigt durch die Mündung eines Vulkans in die Hölle hinab. Während ihrer Künstlerresidenz in Shanghai versucht die mexikanische Designerin in ihrer neuesten Arbeit, die Welt „durch unsere inneren Vulkane“ zu verstehen.
en: Bárbara Sánchez-Kane is descending to hell through the mouth of a volcano. At her artist residency in Shanghai, the Mexican designer’s latest work attempts to make sense of the world ‘through our inner volcanoes’
la: Bárbara Sánchez-Kane per os vulcani descendit ad inferos. In eius artificis residentia in Shanghai, novissimum opus excogitatoris Mexicani efficere conatus est de mundo 'per nostros vulcanos interiores'.
